column1: # GIGANTIC upload_manifest.tsv — integrator / BLOCK_species_X_all_annotations
# Publishes the species_X_all_annotations deliverables. Source globs are
# relative to this manifest's directory (the workflow-RUN_*-species_X_all_annotations/ root).
# Build with (from the integrator subproject root):
#   bash RUN-update_upload_to_server.sh
# (which calls ../../server/ai/update_upload_to_server.py --subproject-dir .)
# Published files land at:
#   ../../upload_to_server/BLOCK_species_X_all_annotations/workflow-RUN_*-species_X_all_annotations/N-output/
# This is a COPYME template (single source of truth). The discovery helper
# ignores manifests in workflow-COPYME-* dirs; copy this file into the canonical
# workflow-RUN_* dir for it to publish (per gigantic_conventions §38/§39).
# NOTE: the per-species base tables (1-output/_shared/) and per-structure wide
# tables (2-output/<structure>/) embed full amino-acid sequences and are large
# (tens of files, up to GBs). They are NOT published by default. To publish them,
# add explicit rows (or globs) below after a first-run size review.
source_path
# ----- Coverage summary -----
OUTPUT_pipeline/1-output/_shared/feature_availability_summary.tsv
column6: One row per species: protein count and per-axis availability flags (gene_sizes, hotspots, nr hits, annotations_hmms, secretome, dark proteome). Documents where each source covers the 70-species set (gene_sizes/hotspots = 64/70).

column1: # ----- QC: validation report -----
OUTPUT_pipeline/3-output/3_ai-validation_report.txt
column6: Fail-fast validation cross-checks (base-table headers, Sequence_Identifier uniqueness and species containment, availability-flag/NA consistency, per-structure row counts, and orthogroup-OCL referential integrity). Status PASS means every cross-check held.
